tasks.build: deno task typecheck && deno task build:stately && deno task build:solidaria && deno task build:components && deno task build:ui
tasks.test:e2e: cd apps/web && bun run playwright test
tasks.publish:stately: (cd packages/solid-stately && npm publish || true) && (deno publish --allow-slow-types -c packages/solid-stately/deno.json || true)
tasks.publish:solidaria: (cd packages/solidaria && npm publish || true) && (deno publish --allow-slow-types -c packages/solidaria/deno.json || true)
tasks.publish:components: (cd packages/solidaria-components && npm publish || true) && (deno publish --allow-slow-types -c packages/solidaria-components/deno.json || true)
tasks.publish:ui: (cd packages/ui && npm publish || true) && (deno publish --allow-slow-types -c packages/ui/deno.json || true)
tasks.release: deno task build && deno task publish:stately && deno task publish:solidaria && deno task publish:components && deno task publish:ui
